# config/mcp-server/mcp-server.config

MCP server configuration constants and factory.

## Interfaces

| Interface                                  | Description                                      |
| ------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------ |
| [ServerConfig](interfaces/ServerConfig.md) | Configuration shape for the MCP server instance. |

## Functions

| Function                                              | Description                                                            |
| ----------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [getPort](functions/getPort.md)                       | Reads the TCP port from the `PORT` environment variable.               |
| [createServerConfig](functions/createServerConfig.md) | Creates a frozen server configuration with environment-aware defaults. |

## Variables

| Variable                                       | Description                                                       |
| ---------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [SERVER\_NAME](variables/SERVER_NAME.md)       | MCP server name used in protocol handshake.                       |
| [SERVER\_VERSION](variables/SERVER_VERSION.md) | MCP server version used in protocol handshake.                    |
| [DEFAULT\_PORT](variables/DEFAULT_PORT.md)     | Default TCP port when the `PORT` environment variable is not set. |
